marketName: All Other Miscellaneous Fabricated Metal Product Manufacturing

assessments.rationale: All slideway and wear-strip grades (C45, 42CrMo4 for structural; C60, 100Cr6 for wear faces) are standard ZOLLERN production grades.

assessments.constraintName: IH Hardness (55-64 HRC on sliding face)
assessments.rationale: ZOLLERN in-line induction hardening achieves up to 64 HRC with +-1.5 HRC control. Slideway running face hardness requirement (55-62 HRC) is fully within capability.
Cold-drawn profiles with IH deliver running-face flatness meeting +-0.03 mm/m specification. IT8 dimensional control ensures consistent geometry.
Slideway rail profiles, clamping sections, and wear strips are typically within 160 mm width. Machine base sub-frames may require wider sections handled via dual-profile design.

assessments.constraintName: Minimum Carbon Content for IH (>=0.35% C)
assessments.rationale: C45 (0.42-0.50% C), C60 (0.57-0.65% C), and 100Cr6 (0.95-1.05% C) all exceed the 0.35% C minimum for reliable induction hardening.
Custom die NRE (5-15K EUR) requires minimum production volume for economic payback. Machine builders with low-volume custom geometries face higher unit costs.
assessments.mitigation: Leverage die library for standard slideway and clamping geometries; amortize custom die cost over multi-year supply contract
